visual: Data Tables (Numeric Display). "Points Scored" — Team A=45, Team B=30, Team C=25, Team D=50, Team E=15. Vertical.
visual_2: Bar Graphs (Mode 2: Creating). Vertical. Scale of 10, axis 0–60. 4 of 5 bars pre-filled: Team B=30, Team C=25, Team D=50, Team E=15. Team A bar empty. Ghost gridlines at 5s visible. Snap-to-5 enabled. Click-to-set.
guide: "Team A scored 45 points. Set the bar for Team A at 45—halfway between 40 and 50."
student_action: Hover to preview, click to set bar at 45 (halfway between 40 and 50 lines)
on_correct: "45. Right between the lines—halfway from 40 to 50."
remediation_light: "Find 40 and 50 on the axis. 45 is halfway between them."
